name: Pokeye Bracington

sheet.name: Pokeye Bracington
sheet.background_story:
A steadfast knight of The Forsaken Lands, known for his immense strength and brutal combat style. Wielding a massive hammer, Pokeye made a name for himself as a mercenary, taking on any job as long as the price was right.

His unpredictable nature made him a force to be reckoned with on the battlefield, but also made it difficult for those who hired him to trust him completely.
